generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for the autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring vehicle speed for ACC operations"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensor measuring steering angle for vehicle control"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
]

instance VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks derived from processed LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Serialized and unit-converted vehicle speed and steering angle data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VehicleSpeedDataTransmitted, SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler, ComputationOffloadingEnabler
]

instance DataMonitoringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for real-time data monitoring and visualization services"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ComputationOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for offloading ACC computations to cloud-based hardware"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for remote operator management of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state data, projected driving paths, and detected object tracks with data saving and report generation capabilities"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateVisualization, ObjectTrackVisualization, DataSaving, ReportGeneration
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation, actuation command generation) to cloud-based hardware"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetection, SpeedCalculation, ActuationCommandGeneration
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables remote operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speeds, and issue emergency braking commands"
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCEnableDisable, SetDesiredSpeed, EmergencyBrakingCommand
]

instance VehicleStateVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle speed and steering angle data"
]

instance ObjectTrackVisualization : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of detected object tracks from LiDAR data"
]

instance DataSaving : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Saves vehicle state and object track data for later analysis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ReportGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates system performance reports based on collected data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance LeadVehicleDetection : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of lead vehicle using processed object tracks"
]

instance SpeedCalculation : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calculation of appropriate speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
]

instance ActuationCommandGeneration : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Generates commands for vehicle actuators based on ACC calculations"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance ACCEnableDisable : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Enables or disables ACC system remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeed : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Sets target speed for ACC operation remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingCommand : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issues emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance PhysicalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity with lower and upper chassis layers and autonomy elements"
]

instance DigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity handling virtual representation of the physical vehicle"
]

instance User : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "User entity for system monitoring and management"
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization subcomponent for real-time data display"
    base:isContainedIn Environment
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel subcomponent for remote commands"
    base:isContainedIn Environment
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTracking : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Component within Physical Twin for processing raw LiDAR point clouds into structured tracks"
    base:isContainedIn Environment
]

instance Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalTwin, DigitalTwin, User, ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel, PointCloudClusteringTracking
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands for Adaptive Cruise Control (ACC), steering, motor, and servo actuation are processed by the ACC Controlling FE and transmitted via ROS2 network to the Actuation FE. The ISO 23247 Data Translation component handles serialization and message alignment for control signals."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization requires 100 ms accuracy for computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations despite industry standards typically mandating stricter synchronization."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "ISO 23247 RA-based architecture implemented using ROS2 packages where each FE is a ROS2 node, organized into three entities deployed on distinct hardware; Physical Twin Entity departs from standard by hosting general automotive functionality such as Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components takes place within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Physical Twin Entity is deployed on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer. Each entity (Physical Twin, Digital Twin, User Entity) is hosted on separate hardware components as per Section IV.B. Data is stored on a device external to the vehicle as specified in Section III.A (R3), with edge computing for real-time processing and cloud storage for persistent data."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Compliance with ISO 23247 standard, specifically Part 2 (Reference Architecture), which structures the Digital Twin into Observable Manufacturing Elements (OME), Data Collection and Device Control Entity, Digital Twin Entity, and User Entity. Part 4 (Information exchange) governs data protocols, with OPC Unified Architecture (OPC UA) implemented for interoperable data collection and device control."
]
